chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Customs Reference Application 165 of 2014 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA 894/2014. 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For orders on CMA 895/2014. 17.09.2025 This reference is pending since 2014 without any progress. Even today the applicant remains unrepresented without any intimation or justification; therefore, the instant reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending application(s). Judge Judge M. Khan
